tabs.title: Where is the Money Flowing?
tabs.content: January 2026 confirmed a market powered by future growth. The off-plan segment continues to dominate, accounting for over 71% of all sales activity. This isn't speculation; it's confidence in Dubai new construction pipelines. However, the ready market is showing remarkable strength in value, with a 49% year-on-year increase, signaling sustained appetite for immediate income-generating assets for investors looking to buy property off plan in dubai or ready units.

tabs.title: Price Per Square Foot
